user.title: LaMetric Rotator
user.description: Pick the LaMetric Time you want to send rotating messages to. Add the items to display via the integration's *Configure* button after setup.

abort.no_lametric: No LaMetric integration is configured yet. Set up the built-in LaMetric integration first.
abort.already_configured: This LaMetric device already has a Rotator configured.

menu.title: Rotation items
menu.description:
Cycles every 10 seconds through the list below. Maximum 10 items.

{summary}

data.scale: Scale factor (e.g. 0.001 to convert W → kW)

data_description.attribute: Read a state attribute instead of the entity's main state. Useful for weather entities (temperature, humidity, wind_speed, pressure, …) which expose values as attributes. Leave empty to use the main state.
data_description.icon: Pick from the curated list, or paste any numeric icon ID from https://developer.lametric.com/icons.
data_description.icon_thresholds: Switch the icon based on the current value. Format: 'value=icon_id,value=icon_id,…'. Example: '25=2738,50=2739,75=2740,100=2741'. The smallest threshold the value is ≤ wins; if the value is above all thresholds (or non-numeric) the default icon above is used.

error.bad_thresholds: Threshold rules must look like 'value=icon_id,value=icon_id,…' — e.g. '25=2738,50=2739'.
